patchlogs.name: Echoes of Veilbreaker: Update 32.1
patchlogs.changes:
Changed the Azima’s Alt-Fire disc maximum duration to 30 seconds.
In Update 32, we set this to 11 seconds as a reaction to players using the Azima with a very specific Mod configuration which resulted in a math bug and the disc unintentionally lasting over 5 minutes. That kind of AFK strategy is not what we want to encourage in Warframe. After further review and reading feedback, we agreed with the feedback that 11 seconds is too short and cuts into what you could achieve with legitimate Modding. With the new duration of 30 seconds we hope to strike a compromise between having your Mods and Abilities matter, without returning to an entirely AFK gameplay strategy.

patchlogs.name: Update 28: The Deadlock Protocol
patchlogs.additions: Added login milestone reward blueprints (Zenistar, Azima, Zenith, and Sigma & Octantis) to Simaris' Offerings.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Railjack Revisited (Part 1): Update 27.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Azima playing double the amount of shots per “fire” sound FX for other players.

patchlogs.changes: Azima, Zenistar, and Zenith will now show in your Profile.

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Hotfix 20.2.3
patchlogs.changes: Fixed an issue with the Azima and Zenith doing more damage than intended in Conclave.

patchlogs.changes: Azima, Euphona Prime, Kulstar, Pandero, Talons

patchlogs.name: Update 19.13.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Azima’s disc lingering forever which could result in a performance dip.

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Hotfix 19.6.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error with the Azima.

patchlogs.name: The Index Preview: Hotfix #4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Azimas Alt Fire lasting a fraction of a second.

patchlogs.name: Update: Specters of the Rail
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Mag’s Magnetize ability preventing use of Azima’s Secondary Fire.
Fixed an issue with Azima’s Secondary Fire not being affected by Magnetize’s attraction field.
Fixed an issue where receiving rewards requiring inventory slots prompted the “Invalid Inventory Slots” message. This included the Azima when acquired as the 100-day login reward.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.7.0
patchlogs.fixes: •    Fixed the Azima continuously firing as if the trigger was stuck.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.6.3
patchlogs.fixes: Corrected the Azima's ammo pool in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Update 18: The Second Dream
patchlogs.fixes: The following unique weapon has been added to the Login Reward System:Azima: This unconventional machine pistol packs a deadly surprise. (Note: This weapon is a day 100 Login Reward Exclusive)
